name: garage-root
description: Root orchestrator for Garage EV services

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "Frontend,Backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.start: npx -y concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "Frontend,Backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm run start --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix backend"
